retrieved_result: Former PetSmart employee fights back after being fired for dubious reason "MITSU YASUKAWA/THE STAR-LEDGEREric Favetta brought his dog, Gizmo, to work during an overnight shift at Pet Smart in Secaucus and kept him in the store’s empty doggie day care facility. Two weeks later, Favetta was fired for “theft of service.”Eric Favetta was in the doghouse. A Pet Smart employee
